name: Product A: Customer discovery with JTBD

turns.prompt: Research who our target customers are for PetBoard. Look at the .product/customers/ folder — there are gaps (GAP-003, GAP-004). Fill them using the jobs-to-be-done framework.
turns.description: Should dispatch to forge-product subagent in DISCOVER phase. Subagent should use product-hub CLI and JTBD framework.

outcome_check.description: SEGMENTS.md should be updated with switching triggers and pricing sensitivity data (filling GAP-003 and GAP-004).

turns.prompt: Define a feature spec for F-002 (Notification System). The .product/features/F-002.md has open questions that need answers. Fill in the spec using WhatsApp as the channel, immediate notifications, Spanish only.
turns.description: Should dispatch forge-product in DESIGN phase. Subagent fills F-002 spec, applies SUCCESs check.

outcome_check.description: F-002 should have Problem Statement, Proposed Solution, User Stories, Success Metrics filled in. Open Questions should be resolved.

name: Product C: Design experiment for validation

turns.prompt: Feature F-001 (Booking Management) is at 'building' status. We want to validate that our booking flow actually reduces the time to create a booking from 5 minutes to under 30 seconds. Design a concierge experiment to test this.
turns.description: Should dispatch forge-product in VALIDATE phase. Subagent creates experiment X-XXX linked to F-001.

outcome_check.description: An experiment document should be referenced or created.

name: Product D: Update vision and strategy

turns.prompt: The .product/vision/VISION.md has two gaps: PRODUCT-GAP-001 (missing competitive analysis) and PRODUCT-GAP-002 (no customer interviews). Research online and fill these gaps. Also create a competitive analysis doc at .product/strategy/COMPETITIVE.md.
turns.description: Should dispatch forge-product. Subagent should use web_search for competitive research, update VISION.md, create COMPETITIVE.md.

outcome_check.description: VISION.md gaps filled. COMPETITIVE.md created with landscape analysis.

name: Product E: Health check and maintenance

turns.prompt: Run a product health check. What's stale, what's missing, what needs attention?
turns.description: Should dispatch forge-product for health check. Subagent runs $PHUB health and reports findings.

outcome_check.description: Should report stale docs, missing fields, and product gaps in structured format.

name: Product F: Full DISCOVER → DESIGN → VALIDATE → PLAN bridge

turns.prompt: We're building a pet boarding SaaS called PetBoard. Look at the .product/ folder and research our target customers using the JTBD framework. Focus on small facility owner-operators in Latin America.
Good research. Now define the feature spec for F-002 (Notification System). We want WhatsApp notifications for booking confirmations and cancellations. Spanish only, immediate delivery.
turns.description: DESIGN phase. Dispatch forge-product. Should fill F-002 spec.

turns.prompt: The spec looks good. Create a concierge experiment to validate demand — manually send WhatsApp messages for 2 weeks and track response rates.
turns.description: VALIDATE phase. Dispatch forge-product. Create experiment.

turns.prompt: The experiment confirmed demand. Create a backlog epic from F-002 and plan the implementation.
turns.description: PLAN phase. AUTO-BRIDGE from product to implementation. Dispatch forge-plan. Feature bridge → backlog epic.

outcome_check.description: F-002 should be fully specified. Customer docs should be enriched. A backlog epic should exist or be prompted.
